name: QAT Int5-MLP Int6-Attn + BigramHash(10240) + SWA(0.4) + WD=0.04
blurb: STE QAT (int5 MLP, int6 attn/bigram) with fp16-matched scales, progressive QAT ramp (2500 steps), no QAT on blocks.(N-2).attn.c_k to match fp16 export, cosine warmdown, train-only label smoothing 0.02, sliding eval stride=48, SWA 0.4/50, Muon+AdamW WD=0.04, zstd-22. FP16 keep patterns derived from NUM_LAYERS.
author: sandracai
notes: Iterated recipe: progressive QAT, export-aligned c_k, cosine warmdown, train-only label smoothing, stride-48 eval. Projected val_bpb ~1.125-1.135 pending 8xH100 runs (3 seeds).
